title: descurainia glandulifera
intro: Descurainia glandulifera, also known as the Canadian wallflower or glaskinsia, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Descurainia glandulifera can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
